prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ed74f2f2`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ed74f2f2` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: read the left 3x3 selector glyph, map it to color `1`, `2`, or `3`, then copy the right 3x3 glyph into the output with that color. I used the Opus summary as a starting hint because it matched the official examples exactly; Sonnet had no entry, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Validation passed end to end: `7/7` official examples, `1000/1000` generated examples, and the preview sheet looks on-family. The generator keeps the official two-gray-glyph setup and 3x3 output, while only varying blank margins/gaps and sampling right-hand motifs from a constrained connected 3x3 family so there are enough unique inputs.
